title: 691656 Starter Solenoid 3 Terminals 12V 555375GS 790951 for Trombetta 812-1201-211-05 812-1201-211-06 Lawn Mower Replacement Solenoid Switch 5/16" 1/4" Eyelet
features: Specifications: Working voltage 12V. Working current 300A. 3 terminals. Eyelet size: 5/16 inch and 1/4 inch
High Quality: This product is made of high-quality materials, rust-resistant, wear-resistant, corrosion-resistant, high and low temperature resistant, durable and long service life

Easy to Install: The shell is light and sturdy, and can be easily placed in a small space. No special tools are required, and the installation is simple. Only damaged parts need to be replaced, saving your time and energy

Stable Performance: Excellent heat resistance, effectively reducing the starting switch current. Sufficient to meet the needs of high-power starting, ensuring its coordination and performance with the engine, thereby extending the service life of the engine
Product Includes: 1 x 691656 starter solenoid, 6 x cable ties, 1 x insulation tape
